snippet.title: Nature Recovery Network
snippet.description:
The Nature Recovery Network (NRN) is a major commitment in the UK Government’s 25 Year Environment Plan and enacted by the Environment Act 2021. The NRN aims to expand, improve and connect a national network of wildlife-rich places across England’s towns, cities, countryside and coast. The national network has a range of ambitious objectives around nature recovery, as well as providing a range of economic, social, and health and well-being benefits.  

Natural England and the Institute of Environmental Management & Assessment (IEMA) are holding a webinar with EIC members so that they can gain a better understanding of NRN and the key role that business can play in supporting nature’s recovery. The online event will be particularly relevant to members of EICs Natural Capital group. 

Members will leave the webinar with a better understanding of: 

- What the NRN is and what it will deliver.
- Why businesses should invest in, and support, the NRN.
- NRN business engagement activities and what is coming up next.

snippet.title: Let's Make: The Dishonored Heart From Dishonored 1 and 2
snippet.description:
Today we're making "The Heart" from the Dishonored series. Let's make it light up and flicker. Maybe we'll throw some moving gears in there. 3D printing, custom paint jobs, electronics, and clay molding. This thing's going to be awesome. #dishonored #arcane #thezachofalltrades

If you are interested in participating in the Ebay auction for this prop, the link is provided below:
http://ebay.us/g02jWM?cmpnId=5338273189

Zach Hanson is a movie and video game prop enthusiast who enjoys creating in his free time. 

Huge thanks to the voice of "The Heart" and cricut specialist "Cricut Katie". 

Hosted and Edited by Zach Hanson
https://twitter.com/TradesOfAllZach
hansonpublishing@outlook.com

Link to the files I used to 3D print the base of The Heart:
https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:2804835

snippet.title: ENL 2-Minute Tips: Translanguaging - Transforming Classroom Communication
snippet.description: Multilingual students often draw upon more than one language within the same sentence, even creating new words by combining the features of multiple languages. In this month's 2-Minute Tip, Dr. Katy Lichon looks at how educators can leverage this process, known as translanguaging, to foster classroom spaces where students can use the full extent of their knowledge to make meaning.

Drama: Modern Marriage
Native Title: 我们的婚姻
Also Known As: Our Marriage , Xian Dai Hun Yin , Wo Men De Hun Yin , 现代婚姻
Director: Shen Yan
Genres: Romance
Country: China
Episodes: 38
Aired: Feb 23, 2022 - Mar 11, 2022
Aired On: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday
Original Network: Tencent Video
Duration: 45 min.

A story that follows a full-time mom reentering the workforce and the adjustments that she and her family have to make.

Full-time mom Shen Huixing (Bai Baihe) used to be a top student at a top university. After marriage, she has chosen to put her talents towards running the family. Her husband Sheng Jiangchuan (Tong Dawei) is extremely busy at work. He barely has any time for them which is why all the responsibilities have fallen on Shen Huixing's shoulder.

As her daughter grows up, Shen Huixing feels that the time is right for her to finally return to the workplace. However, she gets into a competitive relationship with the company Sheng Jiangchuan is working for. Shen Huixing needing her husband to share more family responsibilities also becomes a source of conflict. Things get so bad that the two are battling for divorce! Through their repeated confrontations in the workplace and relationship problems, they gradually mature as individuals.

snippet.title: How To Stop Seeking Approval Of Others
snippet.description:
Doing things to get other people's approval or not doing something because you're waiting for validation? Then you'll want to stick around and watch this video because I'm going to share with you that you don't need someone else's approval to feel good about yourself.  It's essential to take a step back and recognize that depending on others' validation can hurt your confidence and self-esteem. We don't trust ourselves and think their opinion is more valid. If you're struggling to validate yourself and constantly seeking validation from others, ask yourself the question, do I have a low self-perception of myself, someone who is not good enough or not worthy? On a positive note, you can learn to turn this thinking around and build confidence in yourself, and with higher self-esteem, you're not going to care as much. It's challenging, and you may not be able to eliminate the desire to be appreciated, but you can change your need to depend on it entirely.  Here are five ways you can stop seeking validation.

🎥// Watch more
Stop Needing Approval Of Other (Do This Instead)  | https://youtu.be/GpNkJkTeZEU
Stop Seeking Validation | https://youtu.be/DbQMLMdjF_0
Why You Don't Believe In Yourself | https://youtu.be/K9CBQP3vpkI

👉In This Video👈
00:00 - Intro
02:11 - 5 Ways To Stop Seeking Approval From Others
02:24 - Understand Why You Seek Approval

localized.title: How To Stop Seeking Approval Of Others
localized.description:
Doing things to get other people's approval or not doing something because you're waiting for validation? Then you'll want to stick around and watch this video because I'm going to share with you that you don't need someone else's approval to feel good about yourself.  It's essential to take a step back and recognize that depending on others' validation can hurt your confidence and self-esteem. We don't trust ourselves and think their opinion is more valid. If you're struggling to validate yourself and constantly seeking validation from others, ask yourself the question, do I have a low self-perception of myself, someone who is not good enough or not worthy? On a positive note, you can learn to turn this thinking around and build confidence in yourself, and with higher self-esteem, you're not going to care as much. It's challenging, and you may not be able to eliminate the desire to be appreciated, but you can change your need to depend on it entirely.  Here are five ways you can stop seeking validation.

snippet.title: What The Heck Are NFTs? (NFTs Explained) NFT For You
snippet.description:
What is NFT?  You've heard about it, didn't you? People are making A LOT OF MONEY from the new buzzword called the Metaverse or web 3.0, especially from NFTs. This is NFT's explained!

A collection of selfies, a simple tweet, a series of ape and penguin drawings worth MILLIONS – who doesn't want a piece of the pie, right? 

But NFTs are not that simple. A lot of questions arise when talking about this topic. Yes, we all want to earn, and if NFTs are a great way to do that, then we'll surely explore it. 

So we need to know everything about NFTs. Why are they non-fungible? How have they considered 'tokens'? Should you quit your job and just focus on NFTs? Are NFTs just rubbish art? Do they ruin our concept of "art"? Can anybody create and make money out of NFTs? How do you get started investing in NFTs? 

We got a lot of questions. In this episode, we answer all of them with Blockchain VS Accelerator and COO of LongHash Ventures, Wei Shi Khai.

snippet.title: COLLECTION ACCOUNT MANAGERS - WHAT PRODUCERS NEED TO KNOW
snippet.description:
The objective of every independent film production is for their project to get distribution and recoup their investors’ money and for producers to make a profit – so should producers retain a Collection Account Manager to handle distribution revenue for their film?

My firm has gotten many questions over the years about the necessity of entering into an agreement with a collection account manager to handle the revenues generated by the distribution of film projects.  

First, it’s important to understand exactly what a collection account is and what does a collection account manager do. A Collection Account is an account opened in the name of an independent, neutral, third party, the Collection Account Manager or simply the CAM. The CAM receives the distribution revenue on behalf of the beneficiaries of the film. Beneficiaries may include the sales agent, the producers, (institutional) financiers, talent (writers, directors, and actors) and equity investors. The job of the CAM is to ensure that each beneficiary of the film receives its share of the revenues.

There are several advantages of setting up a Collection Account for your film. 

First, the film’s revenue is protected because no one with a financial interest controls the receipt, allocation and distribution of revenue.  Since a neutral, third party, the CAM, controls its, the revenues are safe from the usual financial risks of the film industry, such as in the event one of the beneficiaries enters bankruptcy the revenues received directly by a bankrupt party would be part of such party’s assets.

Second, conflicts of interest are avoided because the CAM will allocate the film’s revenue in accordance with the recoupment schedule, which is part of the CAM agreement. The CAM agreement is typically signed by all parties with a major financial interest in the revenues of the film thereby reducing or eliminating the risk of conflict between the parties of interest.

Third, all parties have transparency as the statements issued by the CAM typically include periodic and cumulative overviews of allocation of revenues, thereby providing all the beneficiaries with the necessary information about the status of recoupment of investments, fees, expenses, and payment of profit participation.

Fourth, the producers are able to completely outsource the administration of the film’s revenues. Independent producers may not have the back-office support to properly administer the film’s revenue and failure to do so properly could lead the producers into deep trouble with investors, profit participants and their union representatives such as SAG, the DGA and the WGA.

So what’s the downside of having a CAM? Some sales agents and/or distributors resist working with CAM’s, but usually only on projects with budgets under a $1M. Also, of course there are fees associated with retaining a CAM which are typically equal to 1% or more of the revenues collected. 

However, due to the complexity of handling distribution revenue and paying residuals and profit participants, it is highly recommended that independent producers and production companies use a Collection Account Manager for handling distribution revenue for their project.

snippet.title: Marvel Moive Character Storm Lookalike Human Size Wax Sculpture
snippet.description:
Storm is a fictional character appearing in American comic books published by Marvel Comics.

Zhongshan Grand Orient Wax Art Co., Ltd. is one of the earliest organizations making waxwork creations in China. We have been specializing in waxwork study and creation for nearly 20 years. (GrandOrient subordinated to Elephant Sculpture Art, which was established in 2000, the group company has played the leading role in wax figures creation, and design,decoration/construction for wax museum and indoor & outdoor theme park.). Our team consisting of the R&D team, sculptor team, 3D team,production team, and after sales team. A total of 20 artists are responsible for the appearance of the statues.

Now we have our own national brand wax museum “Wei Mu Kai La”. The waxworks are widely received by the community and highly recognized by social elites, celebrities and stars. We are authorized by more than 100 celebrities from China and abroad.and our wax museum “Wei Mu Kai La” also growing fast in important culture and tourism cities at home and abroad, including Malaysia, Guangzhou, Changsha, Xiamen, Dalian, Lijiang and Tibet etc. The Chinese brand wax museum is born.

All wax figures can be created depends on pictures and videos, but time is very important, sculptors can work more careful if they have enough time.

Usually we need 4 months to create a custom wax statue, if you want a custom wax statue for someone, please contact us earlier.

snippet.title: LANGKAWI MALAYSIA || CINEMATIC DRONE VIDEO OF LANGKAWI ISLAND || THE JEWEL OF KEDAH, MALAYSIA [4K]
snippet.description:
#LANGKAWI - THE JEWEL OF #KEDAH, #MALAYSIA  is a duty-free island and an archipelago of 99 islands located around 30 kilometers off northwestern Malaysia. This is a #cinematic #drone video of Langkawi Island taken by #dji.

The vast island is home to historical sights, superb #cuisine, excellent #diving-chances, #vibrant_nightlife, and #super-cheap-shopping as one of Malaysia's best-known and most popular beach destinations! This is our #first-time-visit to Langkawi Island where we have been to many adventurous places like the sky bridge, cable car ride, Pantai Cenang beach fireworks, island hopping, etc. This video is a combination of all the famous places we have been to on Langkawi Island. Hope You guys will enjoy it!!

Places/Activities in the Video:
1. Pantai Cenang Beach.
2. Sky Bridge Langkawi.
3. Cable Car Langkawi.
4. Island Hopping on various small Islands.
5. Eagle Feeding.

The video shots are taken in Langkawi Island, Malaysia by #tourist2townie.
